title: AuthenticationMethodTypeValues
description:
Method used to authenticate an Entity

Reference:
https://www.iso20022.org/standardsrepository/type/AuthenticationMethodCode

x-enumeration-literals.name: OnLinePIN
x-enumeration-literals.description: On-line PIN authentication (Personal Identification Number).

x-enumeration-literals.name: OfflinePIN
x-enumeration-literals.description: Off-line PIN authentication (Personal Identification Number).

x-enumeration-literals.name: SignatureCapture
x-enumeration-literals.description: Electronic signature capture (handwritten signature).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Password
x-enumeration-literals.description: Authentication by a password.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Biometry
x-enumeration-literals.description: Biometric authentication of the cardholder.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CSCVerification
x-enumeration-literals.description: Verification of Card Security Code.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CryptogramVerification
x-enumeration-literals.description: Verification of a cryptogram generated by a chip card or another device, for instance ARQC (Authorisation Request Cryptogram).

x-enumeration-literals.name: UnknownMethod
x-enumeration-literals.description: Authentication method is performed unknown.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Bypass
x-enumeration-literals.description: Authentication bypassed by the merchant.

x-enumeration-literals.name: PaperSignature
x-enumeration-literals.description: Handwritten paper signature.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ManualVerification
x-enumeration-literals.description: Manual verification, for example passport or drivers license.

x-enumeration-literals.name: MerchantAuthentication
x-enumeration-literals.description: Merchant-related authentication.

x-enumeration-literals.name: SecureCertificate
x-enumeration-literals.description: Electronic commerce transaction secured with the X.509 certificate of a customer.

x-enumeration-literals.name: SecureNoCertificate
x-enumeration-literals.description: Secure electronic transaction without cardholder certificate.

x-enumeration-literals.name: SecuredChannel
x-enumeration-literals.description: Channel-encrypted transaction.

x-enumeration-literals.name: BillingAddressVerification
x-enumeration-literals.description: Cardholder billing address verification.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CardholderIdentificationData
x-enumeration-literals.description: Cardholder data provided for verification, for instance social security number, driver license number, passport number.

x-enumeration-literals.name: PassiveAuthentication
x-enumeration-literals.description: Authentication based on statistical cardholder behaviour.

x-enumeration-literals.name: SecureElectronicCommerce
x-enumeration-literals.description: Authentication performed during a secure electronic commerce transaction.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ShippingAddressVerification
x-enumeration-literals.description: Cardholder shipping address verification.

x-enumeration-literals.name: TokenAuthentication
x-enumeration-literals.description: Cryptogram generated by the token requestor or a customer device to validate the authorised use of a token.

x-enumeration-literals.name: PaymentToken
x-enumeration-literals.description: Verification or authentication related to the use of a payment token, for instance the validation of the authorised use of a token.

x-enumeration-literals.name: AuthenticationToken
x-enumeration-literals.description: A token is used to verify an already performed authentication.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Mobile
x-enumeration-literals.description: Customer mobile device.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Other
x-enumeration-literals.description: Other customer authentication.

x-enumeration-literals.name: AddressDigits
x-enumeration-literals.description: Digits of the address.

x-enumeration-literals.name: AlienRegistrationNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Number assigned by a government agency to identify foreign nationals.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ARQCVerification
x-enumeration-literals.description: Verification of a cryptogram generated by a chip card, for instance an ARQC (Authorisation Request Cryptogram).

x-enumeration-literals.name: BirthDate
x-enumeration-literals.description: Date of birth of a person.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CardholderName
x-enumeration-literals.description: Name of cardholder

x-enumeration-literals.name: CityOfBirth
x-enumeration-literals.description: City of birth to authenticate a person.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CustomerIdentification
x-enumeration-literals.description: Customer number used as a mechanism of authentication.

x-enumeration-literals.name: DriverIdentification
x-enumeration-literals.description: Identification of a driver in a fleet of vehicles.

x-enumeration-literals.name: DriverLicenseNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Number assigned by a driving license authority to a person driving a car.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Email
x-enumeration-literals.description: Electronic mail address

x-enumeration-literals.name: EmployeeIdentificationNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Number assigned to an employee by an employer.

x-enumeration-literals.name: EmployerIdentificationNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Number assigned to an employer by a registration authority.

x-enumeration-literals.name: IdentityCardNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Number assigned by a national authority to an identity card.

x-enumeration-literals.name: OneTimePassword
x-enumeration-literals.description: Verification of a one-time password provided by the issuer.

x-enumeration-literals.name: OtherCardholderIdentification
x-enumeration-literals.description: Other cardholder data provided for identification.

x-enumeration-literals.name: OtherCryptogram
x-enumeration-literals.description: Verification of a cryptogram generated by a non-card form factor.

x-enumeration-literals.name: PassportNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Number assigned by a passport authority to a passport.

x-enumeration-literals.name: PostalCode
x-enumeration-literals.description: Verification based on digits of the postal code.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ShippingAddressFrom
x-enumeration-literals.description: Shipping address from verification.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ShippingAddressTo
x-enumeration-literals.description: Shipping address to verification

x-enumeration-literals.name: CardholderAddress
x-enumeration-literals.description: Verification whether the address corresponds to the cardholder's one.

x-enumeration-literals.name: NonVisibleCSC
x-enumeration-literals.description: Non visible Card Security Code.

x-enumeration-literals.name: OtherNational
x-enumeration-literals.description: Other type of verification defined at national level.

x-enumeration-literals.name: OtherPrivate
x-enumeration-literals.description: Other type of verification defined at private level

x-enumeration-literals.name: PlaceOfBirth
x-enumeration-literals.description: Place of birth of a person.

x-enumeration-literals.name: SocialSecurityNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Number assigned by a social security agency.

x-enumeration-literals.name: TaxIdentificationNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Number assigned by a tax authority to an entity.

x-enumeration-literals.name: AccountDigitalSignature
x-enumeration-literals.description: Account-based digital signature authentication.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ARPCVerification
x-enumeration-literals.description: Response Card Cryptogram (ARPC)  verification.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ATC
x-enumeration-literals.description: Application Transaction Counter

x-enumeration-literals.name: OffLineBiographics
x-enumeration-literals.description: Biographics authentication in an offline mode.

x-enumeration-literals.name: OffLineBiometrics
x-enumeration-literals.description: Biometrics authentication in an offline mode

x-enumeration-literals.name: OffLineDataAuthentication
x-enumeration-literals.description: Authentication of data in an offline mode

x-enumeration-literals.name: OffLineDigitisedSignatureAnalysis
x-enumeration-literals.description: Analysis of signature transmitted offline

x-enumeration-literals.name: OffLinePINEncrypted
x-enumeration-literals.description: PIN generated offline and transmitted encrypted

x-enumeration-literals.name: OffLinePINInClear
x-enumeration-literals.description: PIN generated offline and transmitted in clear

x-enumeration-literals.name: OnLineBiographics
x-enumeration-literals.description: Biographics authentication in an online mode.

x-enumeration-literals.name: PhoneHome
x-enumeration-literals.description: Customer home phone number.

x-enumeration-literals.name: PhoneWork
x-enumeration-literals.description: Customer work phone number

x-enumeration-literals.name: PKISignature
x-enumeration-literals.description: PKI (Public Key Infrastructure) based digital signature

x-enumeration-literals.name: QualifiedCertificate
x-enumeration-literals.description: QualifiedCertificate

x-enumeration-literals.name: ThreeDS
x-enumeration-literals.description: Authentication performed during a secure electronic commerce transaction.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CardholderCertificateSerialNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Serial number of the cardholder's certificate.

x-enumeration-literals.name: AcceptorCertificateSerialNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Serial number of the acceptor's certificate.

x-enumeration-literals.name: NationalIdentifier
x-enumeration-literals.description: Nationally assigned identifier.
